original_snippet_context: Discussion of exchanging banknotes for silver coins.
relevant_quote: S. ex. atitorisoti a Casu da Moeda u pro- ceder ao troco das notas dc 500 réis, 1$000 e 2J000 pelas novas moedas de prntn dos referidos valores, cuja primeira emissão será dc 4.000:OUO$000.
justification: This text excerpt describes a government measure related to currency exchange, without expressing any opinion or stance regarding the "Caixa de Conversão" itself or broader monetary policies.  It focuses on practical implementation details of coin and banknote exchange.
